category_sources: source_facts.description says prompt theme engine for any shell; official Oh My Posh docs describe a custom prompt engine for any shell.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and docs use the display name Oh My Posh; source_facts.name is oh-my-posh.
docs_sources: Official ohmyposh.dev documentation includes introduction, installation, and configuration sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/JanDeDobbeleer/oh-my-posh, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a prompt theme engine; official docs cover prompt configuration and shell installation.
